_comment: Phase 139.3 — PlatformIO library spec for nano-ros. Add to platformio.ini: lib_deps = nano-ros@*
name: nano-ros
description: Lightweight ROS 2 client for embedded RTOS (Zephyr, FreeRTOS, NuttX, ThreadX, bare-metal). no_std Rust core with C and C++ bindings.
keywords: ros2, ros, robotics, zenoh, dds, xrce-dds, embedded, no_std

build._comment: PlatformIO doesn't drive raw CMake itself; for espidf/zephyr it delegates to the framework's native build, which finds the per-RTOS shell sibling (integrations/esp-idf, integrations/zephyr). For arduino-style frameworks PIO compiles src/ in the consuming project directly.
